overview.description: Unified AI and data orchestration platform for building and automating governed data pipelines
overview.description_long: Keboola is a unified AI and data orchestration platform that lets organizations ingest, transform, and orchestrate governed data pipelines and LLM-powered search and analytics. The platform emphasizes production-ready reliability, error handling, and governance from day one. It has a strong focus on finance teams (CFOs, FP&A, controllers) who need accurate, auditable data for reporting and planning, as well as broader data engineering use cases.

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in 2008, Keboola has helped organizations turn data into reliable decisions for over 15 years, growing from a data integration tool into a unified AI and data orchestration platform.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague by Pavel Doležal, Petr Šimeček, and Milan Veverka
Named G2 Leader in multiple data platform categories

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Keboola's core value is data pipeline orchestration, governance, and reliability — not just AI inference. However, hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) and modern lakehouse tools are encroaching on the same space. The platform's governance, auditability, and finance-team focus provide some differentiation, but the core ETL/ELT tooling is increasingly commoditized.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: The data orchestration and DataOps market is large, growing, and has strong enterprise demand. Keboola has 15+ years of traction, 34K+ users, and major enterprise customers across banking, retail, and real estate. Revenue signals are solid.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Raised $32M in Series A funding and has been operating profitably or near-profitably for 15+ years. The company has a substantial customer base (34K+ users) and multiple enterprise contracts, reducing runway risk.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Keboola is a well-established scaleup with solid enterprise traction and funding, but faces increasing competition from cloud-native data platforms. The medium overall risk reflects competitive pressure from well-funded incumbents despite Keboola's strong customer relationships and governance focus.

metadata.notes: Series A amount of $32M sourced directly from company about page. Founded 2008-12-17 per JSON-LD schema. 90+ team members per about page; LinkedIn shows 100-200 range. 7 open roles on Lever at time of scraping.
